headline: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
summary: Apple plans a "revamped" entry-level MacBook Pro, potentially launching by early 2027. Four new iPad Pros are also expected in spring with internal upgrades. The redesign hints at significant changes for Apple's budget pro laptop.

headline: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
summary: Sony will cease making physical discs for new PlayStation games from January 2028. This move is seen as a negative for gamers and game preservation efforts. Retailers express sadness over the impending end of physical media.

headline: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft's looming layoffs and studio closures
summary: Xbox is undergoing a major "reset" due to significant business challenges. CEO Asha Sharma warned staff of looming layoffs and potential studio closures. The changes are attributed to a 3% "accountability margin" and higher costs.

headline: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX's AI phone prototype
summary: Elon Musk strongly denies reports of SpaceX developing an AI phone prototype. The Wall Street Journal reported SpaceX showed a "handset-like prototype" to investors. The alleged device was described as "slimmer than an iPhone."

headline: Onimusha: Way of the Sword Release Date Moved Forward
summary: Capcom moved Onimusha: Way of the Sword's release date forward. The action-adventure sequel will now launch on September 4th. It will be available on PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2.

headline: The $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is $380 During the Wayfair 4th of July Sale
summary: A luxury power lift recliner and massage chair is heavily discounted. Originally priced at $1,800, it's now $380 during Wayfair's 4th of July Sale. This deal offers significant savings on a high-comfort item.

headline: Marvel Super Heroes Comes to Magic: The Gathering
summary: Marvel Super Heroes are being integrated into Magic: The Gathering. This collaboration aims to attract new players to the card game. The article explores if this is a good entry point for newcomers.

headline: Marvel Refused to Tell Sadie Sink About Her Spider-Man: Brand New Day Character Until Filming Started
summary: Sadie Sink's Spider-Man character identity was kept secret even from her. She didn't see the script for "Brand New Day" until filming began. Marvel maintained tight secrecy around her unrevealed role.

headline: Superstar Kane produces his biggest England moment
summary: Harry Kane delivered a monumental moment for England football. His World Cup performance against DR Congo is hailed as his greatest. Chief football writer Phil McNulty lauded Kane's rescue act.

headline: Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble tells BBC she will give him 'mother's warmth'
summary: Two-year-old Kleiber Moran was rescued after six days trapped in earthquake rubble. His aunt pledged to provide him with a mother's warmth and care. The rescue followed last week's deadly earthquakes.

headline: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
summary: Afghan migrants accuse Turkish police of brutal beatings with iron rods. They claim they were stripped and tied in freezing conditions. Some migrants reportedly lost limbs due to severe frostbite.

headline: From Truman's pension to Trump's billions - a White House windfall unmatched by any president
summary: Donald Trump's $2.2bn income last year is unprecedented for a former president. Historians note this blurs lines on potential conflicts of interest. His financial gains far exceed those of previous presidents like Truman.
